description: An operator needs an accurate 48-hour power generation forecast for a 100 MW solar farm.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest cloud cover and irradiance forecasts for the solar farm's location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent fetches high-resolution weather data for the next 48 hours.

nodes.task_description: Check the asset management system for any planned maintenance or known outages at the farm.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all inverters are scheduled to be online.

nodes.task_description: Generate an hourly generation forecast (in MWh) based on the weather forecast and asset availability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a detailed generation forecast table.
